description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, almost black wooden body accented by gold trim and ornate decorative carvings on the front panel. The piano features two wall-mounted candle holders on either side of the music desk, and several sheets of aged, crumpled sheet music are scattered on top of the piano, on the keyboard, and on the floor. The keyboard is fully exposed, showing a standard arrangement of white and black keys, and a matching round black piano stool sits in front. The back of the piano reveals wooden support slats and more sheet music, while the sides have sturdy brass handles for moving. The overall finish is slightly worn, giving the piano a vintage, well-used appearance. The piano is large and heavy, typical of upright pianos found in urban public spaces, old bars, or community centers.
description: A vintage upright piano with ornate gold trim, candle holders, and scattered sheet music, accompanied by a matching black stool. The piano has a worn, dark wood finish and brass handles on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate carvings, exposed keyboard, candle holders, and scattered sheet music with the stool in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the piano's depth, brass handle, and the arrangement of sheet music on top and on the floor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden support slats, more sheet music, and the overall boxy structure of the piano.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brass handle, candle holder, and the placement of the stool and sheet music.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
